title: Lead Backend Engineer at LightWork AI
company_focus: AI operating system for property management
description:
This is a job that Jill, our AI Recruiter, is recruiting for
on behalf of one of our customers.

She will pick the best candidates from Jack's network

The next step is to speak to Jack.

Job Title: Lead Backend Engineer

Company Description: LightWork AI - VC-backed startup
building the AI operating system for property management.

Job Description: As the most senior backend engineer, you
will architect and build the scalable services powering
Felicity, an AI assistant automating 80–90% of property
management workflows. You will design event-driven systems
in Node.js/TypeScript, integrate advanced LLMs, and
establish the technical standards for a high-performing
engineering team in a fast-scaling startup environment.

Location: London, UK

Why this role is remarkable:

- Join as the most senior backend authority working directly
  with a founding team from Revolut, ESG Book, and Mimica.
- Shape the technical backbone of a platform disrupting a
  massive industry where 75% of time is currently wasted on
  manual admin.
- Lead the transition from pilot phase to scale, owning the
  architecture and engineering culture of a potential AI
  unicorn.

What you will do:

- Architect and build scalable backend systems and RESTful
  APIs using Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.
- Design and maintain microservice and event-driven
  architectures that support real-time operational workflows
  and AI integrations.
- Lead technical strategy, mentor engineers, and conduct code
  reviews to ensure production-grade reliability and
  performance.

The ideal candidate:

- 7+ years of professional backend experience with deep
  expertise in Node.js and TypeScript ecosystems.
- Proven track record of designing and operating production
  systems in microservice or event-driven architectures.
- Strong leadership ability with experience mentoring
  engineers and translating complex business requirements
  into robust technical solutions.

Who are Jack & Jill? Ok, I'll go first. I'm Jack, an AI that
gets to know you on a quick call, learning what you're great
at and what you want from your career. Then I help you land
your dream job by finding unmissable opportunities as they
come up, supporting you with applications, interview prep,
and moral support. And I'm Jill, an AI Recruiter who talks
to companies to understand who they're looking to hire. Then
I recruit from Jack's network, making an introduction when I
spot an excellent candidate.

Next steps Step 1. Visit our website. Step 2. Click 'Talk to
Jack'. Step 3. Talk to Jack so he can understand your
experience and ambitions. Step 4. Jack will make sure Jill
(the AI agent working for the company) considers you for
this role. Step 5. If Jill thinks you're a great fit and her
client wants to meet you, they will make the introduction.
Step 6. If not, Jack will find you excellent alternatives.
All for free.

We never post fake jobs This isn't a trick. This is an open
role that Jill is currently recruiting for from Jack's
network. Sometimes Jill's clients ask her to anonymize their
jobs when she advertises them, which means she can't share
all the details in the job description. We appreciate this
can make them look a bit suspect, but there isn't much we
can do about it.

Give Jack a spin! You could land this role. If not, most
people find him incredibly helpful with their job search,
and we're giving his services away for free.
responsibilities: Architect and build scalable backend systems and RESTful APIs using Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL
Design and maintain microservice and event-driven architectures supporting real-time operational workflows and AI integrations
Integrate advanced LLMs into the Felicity AI assistant platform
Lead technical strategy, mentor engineers, and conduct code reviews to ensure production-grade reliability
Establish technical standards and engineering culture for a fast-scaling startup team
Drive the transition from pilot phase to production scale
use_cases: AI assistant automating 80-90% of property management workflows
Reducing manual admin time in property management operations
Real-time operational workflow automation for property managers
AI-powered operating system for the property management industry
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves directly integrating advanced LLMs and
building the backend services powering Felicity, an AI
assistant. While the primary title is backend engineer, the
job explicitly requires integrating LLMs and building the
architecture that supports AI workflows, making this an ai-
first role where the engineer is hands-on with AI system
implementation.
